title: Property Consultant - Kolte-Patil Developers - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Kolte-Patil Developers - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
We at Kolte-Patil Developers are looking for an experienced Property Consultant based out of Rajkot. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Kolte-Patil Developers:
Kolte-Patil Developers is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kolte-Patil Developers!
